response: Dear Team, Friday will be my last day working alongside you, and I wanted to take a moment to say goodbye. Working here has been an incredible journey, and I’m deeply grateful for the support, laughter, and collaboration we’ve shared. The lessons I’ve learned and the relationships we’ve built have shaped me both professionally and personally, and I will carry them into my next chapter with pride. Please stay in touch; you can reach me at my personal email, [email protected], or on LinkedIn. I wish each of you continued success and happiness, and I hope our paths cross again soon.
